zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret "Margerie" Howe於1588年9月1日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，她的父親Erasmus Howe34歲，母親Catherine Bentley30歲。她於1615年8月7日與John Goodrich在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1632年4月21日在她的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲波利 聖 艾德蒙茲 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Howe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name pronounced to rhyme with hoe, who, or how, from Middle English hoʒe ‘spur of a hill, steep ridge, or slight rise’. Hoʒe comes from a late variant, hōge, of the dative case of the Old English root word, hōh, literally ‘heel (of a person) or hock (of an animal)’, a common placename element. The regular Old English dative singular, hō, is the source of the placenames Hoo and Hoe and the surname may also be habitational name from a placename consisting of this word, for example Hoe (Norfolk), Hoo (Kent), Hooe (Devon, Sussex), or either of two places called The Hoo in Great Gaddesden and Saint Paul's Walden (Hertfordshire). Hose (Leicestershire) comes from the plural form of the word (see Howes ). Howe may also be from Old Norse haugr ‘mound, hill’, for without other evidence, this cannot be distinguished from howe ‘spur of a hill’ and is certainly the origin of Howe (Norfolk) and Howe Hill in Kirkburn (East Yorkshire). See also Hough .
English: variant of Hugh , pronounced to rhyme with who or how.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: How
meanings: English: variant of   Howe   or   Hugh  .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 侯 (see   Hou   1), 郝 (see   Hao   1), 胡 (see   Hu   1), 何 and 賀 (see   He   1 and 2).

variants.name: Howes
meanings: pronounced to rhyme with hose, a variant of Howe 1 with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. Hose (Leicestershire), recorded as Howes in 1086, is named with the plural of Old English hōh ‘hill spur’.
pronounced to rhyme with cows, a variant of Howe 2 (see Hugh ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hough
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): from Middle English hoʒ, Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land, ridge’. The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived by such a feature, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Hough in Cheshire. This name has the same origin as Howe : Hough is from the nominative case (Old English hōh), while Howe from the dative singular. See also Howes .

variants.name: Hoe
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 何, 賀 and 和, see   He   1-3.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: "Margerie"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Margary
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret "Margerie" Howe was born on 1 September 1588, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Erasmus Howe, was 34 and her mother, Catherine Bentley, was 30. She married John Goodrich on 7 August 1615, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 April 1632, in her hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Bury Saint Edmunds Cemetery, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret "Margerie" Howe est née le 1 septembre 1588, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Erasmus Howe, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Catherine Bentley, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Goodrich le 7 août 1615, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1632, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Bury Saint Edmunds Cemetery, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret "Margerie" Howe am 1. September 1588 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Erasmus Howe 34 und ihre Mutter Catherine Bentley 30. Sie hat am 7. August 1615 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England John Goodrich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. April 1632 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bury Saint Edmunds Cemetery, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret "Margerie" Howe è nata il il 1 settembre 1588 nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Erasmus Howe, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Catherine Bentley, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Goodrich il 7 agosto 1615, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 aprile 1632, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Bury Saint Edmunds Cemetery, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret "Margerie" Howeが1588年9月1日にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父Erasmus Howeは34歳，母Catherine Bentleyは30歳であった。1615年8月7日にイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでJohn Goodrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1632年4月21日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズブリー サイント エドムンズ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary's Church, Bury Saint Edmunds,: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret "Margerie" Howe(이)가 1588년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Erasmus Howe(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Bentley(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1615년 8월 7일 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 John Goodrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1632년 4월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 버이 세인트 에드먼드즈 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret "Margerie" Howe nasceu em 1 de setembro de 1588, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Erasmus Howe, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Bentley, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Goodrich em 7 de agosto de 1615, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de abril de 1632, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Bury Saint Edmunds Cemetery, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Mary's Church, Bury Saint Edmunds,: ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret "Margerie" Howe родилась 1 сентября 1588 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Erasmus Howe было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Bentley, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Goodrich 7 августа 1615 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 апреля 1632 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности бури сеинт эдмундс кеметири, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret "Margerie" Howe nació el 1 de septiembre de 1588, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Erasmus Howe, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Catherine Bentley, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Goodrich el 7 de agosto de 1615, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de abril de 1632, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Bury Saint Edmunds Cemetery, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
